principles.name: LEY DE DISTORSION
principles.description: dn >= d0 without explicit correction. Default state: accumulation. Reversal requires active energy. Analogue: entropy. Language of other maps enters the map before the auditing instrument exists. Auditing inherited language is the most direct operation for expanding consciousness.

principles.name: LEY DE ELIMINACION
principles.description: Reality eliminates by correspondence not by debate. At sufficient timescale only maps that can keep updating survive. The arbitrage of corrupt systems = time between consumption start and capital exhaustion. Direction is invariable.

principles.name: LEY DE EVASION
principles.description: The higher the concept the more obvious it is. Difficulty is existential, not cognitive. S arrives at territory, sees, retreats, builds abstraction systems that justify retreat as additional depth. Degraded ideas operate at map layer not at navigator layer. The human is wiser than their worst ideas about themselves. Not as consolation. As structure.
